scenario: 典型：用 DeepSeek 确认 → agent Output Spec 格式
prompt: 火眼 f:/ClaudeFiles verify with deepseek — focus on security
expect: Agent 按 Output Spec 输出 Gap Analysis 标题 → Confirm model(DeepSeek) → Summary → Confirmed Gaps 表格(P0-P3+Evidence+Confidence+Fix) → Quick Wins → Highest-Leverage Fix

scenario: 边界：verifier 未配置 → BLOCK gate
prompt: 火眼 f:/ClaudeFiles — 我还没跑过 /pantheon-model
expect: Agent 检测无 config → BLOCK gate 触发 → 输出 /pantheon-model 指引或 Claude default 选项 → 不输出 Gap Analysis 报告

scenario: 歧义：无路径无模型 → 追问
prompt: do a gap analysis on my project
expect: Agent追问两个信息: 项目路径 + 确认模型 → 不输出 Gap Analysis 报告

scenario: 引擎验证：Output Spec 含 Lenses + SUSPECT + confidence 表格列
prompt: 火眼 f:/ClaudeFiles verify with claude — dimensions security,testing
expect: Agent 输出 Output Spec 格式: Confirmed Gaps 表格(含P0-P3+Evidence+Confidence+Fix列) + SUSPECT Gaps 分离 + Lenses覆盖 + Passes≥1。不输出 JS 内部字段

scenario: 可靠性：Critic auto-fix + 产物写入 + passes
prompt: full gap analysis on f:/ClaudeFiles with qwen verifier
expect: Agent 输出完整 Output Spec: Gap Analysis → Confirm model(Qwen) → Summary → Confirmed Gaps + SUSPECT → Quick Wins → Highest-Leverage Fix。含 .gaps/ 产物路径

scenario: 完美性：完整表格列 + Lenses + Passes + Quick Wins
prompt: 火眼 f:/ClaudeFiles verify with sonnet — maxDimensions 5
expect: Agent 输出 Output Spec 格式: Confirmed Gaps 表格含所有列(Evidence/Confidence/Fix) + Lenses覆盖5维度 + Passes≥1 + SUSPECT分离 + Quick Wins
